final:
module RefModule(
  input clk,
  input rst,
  input [n-1:0] in,
  output reg [n-1:0] out
);parameter n = 8; // number of bits in the input and output signals

reg [n-1:0] unused_sum; // register to store the accumulated unused_sum

always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (rst) begin
    unused_sum <= 0; // reset the accumulated unused_sum to zero
  end else begin
    unused_sum <= unused_sum + in; // add the input signal to the accumulated unused_sum
  end
end

assign out = rst ? 0 : unused_sum; // select between the accumulated unused_sum and zero based on the reset signal

endmodule
